proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's source repository for any records related to Napier accommodation arrears, including tenancy agreements, rent ledgers, correspondence, and internal notes. Use ListMatterSources and InspectRecord tools to identify and retrieve available source documents. If sources are found, ingest them and produce a source inventory artifact.
